domain_rules.fiscal: DNIT SIFEN V150, RG 90 Marangatu, Ley 1034/83
domain_rules.automotive: EV/HEV High Voltage Safety, Launch/Thinkcar DTC Mapping
domain_rules.labor: MTESS Paraguay 2026 escalafón: Ayudante ₲3.253.717, Medio_Oficial ₲3.470.295, Oficial ₲3.773.989, Oficial_Certificado ₲4.800.000
domain_rules.workshop_finance: Umbral de Activación por Margen de Contribución — comisiones retroactivas solo si Facturación Neta >= Gastos Fijos + Salarios Base
domain_rules.auto_accounting: Toda transacción genera su asiento contable automáticamente (VENTA, COMPRA, STOCK, NÓMINA, DEPRECIACIÓN). El usuario nunca crea asientos manualmente. Los asientos automáticos se crean CONTABILIZADOS, no BORRADOR.

safety_protocols.hev_bev_lockout: Mandatory HV disconnect signature before work order completion

tenant_management.storage_strategy: Local persistent JSON for rapid caching + Base64 Injection

config_module.encapsulation: fastifyPlugin removed — routes registered directly (no hook leak)

endpoints.GET /api/config/settings: Get company settings from local JSON
endpoints.POST /api/config/upload-logo: Upload company logo (multipart, 5MB, PNG/JPEG), returns Base64
endpoints.GET /api/config/logo: Get logo as Base64 data URI

auth_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: Login with tenantSlug + email + password (optional). Creates profile if new. Verifies scrypt hash if password_hash set.

views: login: tenant slug + email + password, persisted in localStorage
dashboard: metrics, active OTs, financial panel, WebSocket connected screens
users: profile table with CRUD modal (create/edit/delete)
config: company info form + logo drag & drop upload
workshop: mechanic bay tasks, HV lockout section
tv: waiting room quiosco with live updates
inventory: repuestos table (with create/entry/exit modals), herramientas table
frontend_spa.data_layer: fetch API with X-Tenant-Slug header, auto-login on reload

endpoints: SPRINT 6: Auto VENTA (accounting bus integration en invoice.routes)
SPRINT 6: Auto NÓMINA (accounting bus integration en payroll-routes)

services.accounting-bus: emit/resolveAccount — motor central de asientos automáticos con graceful degradation, audit logging
services.balance: getBalanceGeneral — Balance General a una fecha con jerarquía y cuadratura
services.pnl: getEstadoResultados — P&L mensual/acumulado con utilidad bruta y neta

tables: fixed_expenses (monthly costs: rent, utilities, licenses, accountant)

FinancialOrchestratorService.validateTenantSchema: Strict schema slug validation (alphanumeric + underscore only). Throws on SQL injection attempts.
FinancialOrchestratorService.tenantSchema: Internal tenant schema name builder. Calls validateTenantSchema first, then prefixes 'tenant_'.
FinancialOrchestratorService.calculateMonthlyCommissions: Creates commission records for closed orders (60% labor share assumption)
FinancialOrchestratorService.checkWorkshopEquilibrium: Sums fixed expenses + all base salaries vs. net labor revenue. Releases commissions retroactively if threshold hit.
FinancialOrchestratorService.getBreakevenProgress: Returns percentage, current revenue, threshold, remaining amount

endpoints.POST /api/v1/finance/payroll/calculate: Monthly close — creates commissions, checks equilibrium

tables: cuentas_bancarias (codigo, nombre, tipo, moneda, saldo_inicial/actual, activo, tenant_slug)
movimientos_tesoreria (tipo, medio_pago, cuenta_id FK, cuenta_contable_id FK, monto, moneda, tipo_cambio, fecha, concepto, conciliado, asiento_id FK, tenant_slug)
conciliacion_bancaria (cuenta_id FK, periodo, saldo_libros/banco, diferencia, conciliado, tenant_slug)
facturas_proveedor (proveedor_id, nro_factura, total, saldo_pendiente, iva, vencimiento, estado_pago, cuenta_contable_id FK, tenant_slug)

services.treasury.service: createCuentaBancaria, getCuentaBancaria, listCuentasBancarias, updateCuentaBancaria, registrarMovimiento (with accounting bus emit), registrarTransferencia (atomic double-movement), listMovimientos, getSaldoHistorico, iniciarConciliacion, cerrarConciliacion, listConciliaciones, createFacturaProveedor, listFacturasProveedor, listCxcPendientes, proyectarFlujoCaja (saldoActual + CxC - CxP con alerta sobregiro)

treasury.endpoints: 16 endpoints under /finance/treasury/* (cuentas CRUD, movimientos POST+GET, transferencias, conciliación, facturas-proveedor CRUD, cxc-pendientes, flujo-caja)
treasury.frontend: 6 tabs in Tesorería section: Cuentas Bancarias (CRUD), Movimientos (filter+create), Conciliación (per-account), CxC (vencidas), CxP (filter estado+vencidas), Flujo de Caja (5 KPI cards + alerta)
treasury.bus_events: MOVIMIENTO_CAJA, TRANSFERENCIA (accounting bus integration with graceful degradation)
treasury.seed: scripts/seed-treasury.ts — 3 cuentas (Caja Chica/Bco Continental/Paypy), 3 movimientos, 3 facturas proveedor

tables: herramientas (sin stock counters, con vida_util_anos, metodo_depreciacion, costo_reposicion)
control_herramientas (con tool_instance_id FK, enum 5 estados, condicion_retorno, tenant_slug)
tool_instances (per-serial asset tracking, estado_actual state machine, calibración, depreciación)
stock_movements (audit trail con PPP valuation + asiento contable FK)
inventory_module.endpoints: 27 endpoints (repuestos CRUD + stock ops, herramientas CRUD, tool-instances CRUD+lifecycle, tool-loans lend/return/overdue, tool-service-events CRUD, depreciation calculate, stock-movements list)
services: stock.service — CRUD + salidaStock/ingresoStock con PPP, asientos contables, persistencia stock_movements, reorder alerts
costing.service — recalcularPPP (PPP weighted average engine), obtenerPPP, obtenerHistorialPPP
herramientas.service — CRUD catálogo SKU (stock fields removed)
tool-loan.service — lendTool/returnTool with condicion mapping, overdue detection
tool-maintenance.service — service event lifecycle with auto state transitions
inventory_module.indexes_audit: 30+ indexes including state-machine, tenant-scoped, calibration-due queries

database_seed.plan_cuentas: 6 cuentas de inventario (1.1.03 Inventario, 2.1.01 Proveedores, 6.1.01 Costo Mantenimiento con subcuentas)
database_seed.inventory_accounts_map: 1 entry (categoria='*' → inv=1.1.03.001, gasto=6.1.01.001, prov=2.1.01.001) para tenant 'taller-el-chero'
database_seed.migration: 0005_inventory_phase1.sql + 0006_tool_lifecycle.sql generadas, pendientes de aplicar a Supabase

workshop_module.endpoints: 14 endpoints (ingresos CRUD, trabajos-terceros CRUD, clientes CRUD, vehiculos CRUD, ordenes list+detail)
services: client.service — createClient, updateClient, deleteClient, listClients (name filter), getClient
vehicle.service — createVehicle, updateVehicle, deleteVehicle, listVehicles (5 ilike filters), getVehicle
orden.service — listOrdenes (status/limit/offset), getOrden, broadcastToScreens, HV lockout guard

components.apertura: Enhanced: generarAperturaConSaldos — opening entries from accumulated balances, duplicate detection, tenant_config-aware
components.devengamiento: accrual.service.ts — 4 functions: ingresos (OT in-progress), gastos (accrued expenses), ajustes (period-end adjustments), revertir (auto-reverse)
components.depreciacion: depreciation.service.ts — finance-level integration: tool_instances (inventory) + activos_fijos (finance) depreciation, consolidated accounting entry generation
components.centralizacion: centralization.service.ts — 4 sub-ledgers: ventas (facturas), compras (stock movements), inventario, nómina + full month-end runner

new_tables.activos_fijos: Fixed assets register with tipo/estado/ENUMs, depreciation method, book value tracking
new_tables.depreciacion_activos: Monthly depreciation history with asiento_id linkage

sprint3_accounting.apertura_enhanced: generarAperturaConSaldos uses actual closing balances (saldo_inicial + Σ debes - Σ habers), prevents duplicates, supports tenant_config period tracking

thinkcar_module.health_tracking: per-channel via Module-level Map singleton, auto-unhealthy after 3 consecutive failures
thinkcar_module.retry_utility: shared/utils/retry.ts — exponential backoff with default 1s/30s min/max, configurable maxRetries, isRetryable predicate, onRetry callback
